The secret - ALMOST revealedï¿½	103 Comments

>>> This is a long post. But itï¿½s important stuff, and I needed to take the time to explain it to you. Please take the time to read it completely - itï¿½s important to your business. <<<

OK, letï¿½s all take a deep breathï¿½ the rumors have been spreading like a wildfire, and itï¿½s time to calm things down before this gets COMPLETELY out of handï¿½

Over the last few weeks we have released three ï¿½Going Natural 2.0? videos. From everything Iï¿½ve heard, people loved themï¿½ they loved the killer content and they loved the production values.

(OK, I will admitï¿½ yes, I am a bit proud of my video production skills. I mean, Iï¿½ve got some chops - I donï¿½t know many other Internet Marketers who have won National Emmys or who were principals in the Blair Witch Project. Yes, the videos rockedï¿½ yes, Iï¿½m proud of them.)

In any case, after we released those videos the rumors started upï¿½ people were saying we were about to re-open StomperNet. Every time I denied the rumor, it just seemed to fan the flames.

And then we released our Stomper Scrutinizer software. And instead of charging something like $300 a month for the product, we released it for free.

(If you havenï¿½t gotten your copy yet, go get it here)

Now that REALLY shook people up. People were wondering ï¿½just what are these guys up to?ï¿½

In fact, you might have been one of those folks who were wondering what was going on.

And, of course, the rumors started up againï¿½ people were saying that StomperNet was about to re-open.

Wellï¿½ let me clear this up right nowï¿½


We are NOT about to re-open StomperNet. Maybe in a few months, but not now. So if you were hoping to get into Stomperï¿½ well, it ainï¿½t going to happen anytime soon. Sorry about that.

HOWEVERï¿½ we do have something coming - and itï¿½s coming very soon.

I donï¿½t want to be all secretive about this, but weï¿½re going to be releasing another Going Natural 2.0 video on Monday. This will be the best and most content-packed video yet. The script is in its final stages right now, and weï¿½ll be shooting and editing the video over the weekendï¿½

And I think youï¿½re going to be shocked at some of the stuff we have in the video. If you thought the first three Going Natural 2.0 videos had great contentï¿½ well this one is going to seriously raise the bar.

But this isnï¿½t just about ï¿½contentï¿½ï¿½ itï¿½s about a fundamental shift in whatï¿½s happening online. The buzzword on everyoneï¿½s lips these days is ï¿½Web 2.0?.

And sometimes when you keep hearing a buzzword, you think itï¿½s just hype.

Well, there is a huge amount of hype around Social Media and Web 2.0ï¿½ but donï¿½t get distracted by the hype - thereï¿½s also a fundamental change taking place deep in the underbelly of Internet Marketing.

Make no mistakeï¿½ search has changed. And conversion has changed. Big time.

For well more than six months, weï¿½ve had our Stomper faculty studying this stuff feverishly. The amount of hours and resources that we have poured into this is simply crazyï¿½ but with such a fundamental shift happening online, there was simply no other way.

And the strategies and tactics that we uncovered (and then started using) are are working crazy-good.

Do you want instant search engine rankings?

    Check. Within hours, in fact.

More natural high-converting traffic?

    Check. Monster traffic.

How about multiple Google rankings?

    Check. I wouldnï¿½t believe it if I didnï¿½t see it.

How about a higher conversion rate?

    Check. The phrase ï¿½Holy Grailï¿½ keeps running through my head.

I could go on and on - but thatï¿½s what we are going to show you in our next video, so I donï¿½t want to spill all the beansï¿½

Like I said, the video is going to shake people up. And itï¿½s not going to just be a bunch of ï¿½what to doï¿½ï¿½ weï¿½re going to show you HOW we do it.

But letï¿½s get back to those rumorsï¿½

This is the bottom lineï¿½ we are going to be releasing a Coaching Program very soon.

As you probably know, weï¿½ve never done anything like this. Our business has been running a very high-end training portal for Internet Marketers: StomperNet.

And frankly, the price for StomperNet has meant some people just couldnï¿½t afford it. That doesnï¿½t make me happy, but when we decided to go with the best faculty that my dollars could buy, it meant we had to price it at the higher end of the spectrum.

But this change we are seeing right now is so big and the opportunities are so huge, that we decided that we had to do something different.

So we went back to the drawing board - and we decided that if StomperNet was sorta like going to Graduate School to get a real-world MBA, then we needed something more focused (and lower-priced) that would be like taking a single very focused high-level university course.

ï¿½Stomper Universityï¿½ if you will. I like the sound of that. :-)

And THAT is what weï¿½re going to be releasing very soonï¿½ like next week.

Of course, like any class, this Coaching Program is going to have to be limited in size. Thatï¿½s the only way we can insure that we maintain our Stomper quality.

And since this is the first time anyone is going to get a peek behind the curtain at a super-focused Stomper Coaching Program (especially without the normal Stomper sticker price), I imagine the demand will be pretty intense.

But weï¿½ll have more time to talk about that laterï¿½ Iï¿½m working on contingency plans and Iï¿½m hoping we can meet the demand.

In the meantime, watch for our next Going Natural 2.0 video that we are releasing on Monday. This isnï¿½t some ï¿½pre-launch hypeï¿½ video. You have already seen in our last three videos that we are all about delivering serious, meaty content. This video is going to be the best yet.

Thatï¿½s it for nowï¿½ if you have any questions or comments (or if you just want to watch everyone elseï¿½s reaction), then go to our blog now and join the conversation.

Best regards,
Andy

P.S. If you want to see ALL the Going Natural 2.0 videos in one place, we set up a an ï¿½uber video pageï¿½ for you.
